寒夜翩跹 安息在森林的生灵化作灵蝶，以思念为指引，与迷途的旅人短暂相会。\n1月18日更新后，主题活动【暮冬的溯影】限时开启！感应非凡性感套装【诺特·暮冬烁灵】！\n*套装动作【神蝶召来】可在完成【暮冬烁灵】套装及设计师之影收集后通过【成就】获取。 \n⭐暮冬烁灵⭐设计灵感揭秘：\n传闻在北地，有片只在闪电夜出现的奇幻森林。\n自由的生灵离去后，会化为蝴蝶在此处安息。\n今夜，是否有人会如传说般，去到那片森林之中？\n从枯木涌起的白雾，迷路的孩子，深藏于心底的回忆……\n记忆重逢，诺特忽然想起，那个从未忘记过的名字。\n灵蝶翩跹而来，轻轻点在他的嘴唇，仿佛诉说着无尽的思念。\n今夜过后，风停雪止，窗外朝阳初升，北地迎来了久违的晴天。\n尘封的大门缓缓开启，不起眼的枯木法杖上再度浮现古老预言，\n“摆脱命运之子，终结宿命之争”。 \n⭐暮冬烁灵⭐设计亮点：\n忽闪的灵蝶穿越白雾，起舞于梦境与回忆之间。\n黑色的枯木矗立在夜色之中，高悬的提灯散发出静谧的冷光。\n入夜后的迷雾是森林的意志，引导生灵走向平静与安息。\n这是一支由叹息组成的安魂曲。#闪耀暖暖\",\"itemId\":\"7324170854047304960\",\"statisticsInfo\":{\"collectCount\":121,\"diggCount\":3757,\"commentCount\":898},\"appId\":1128,\"secId\":\"Dw+KtzxdxKL616T5MQ14rZZ5xwiEuBf4kH7JgBJbEf0VuS9QAa2BMrYOqcx33KP0ijrzyiEscwTNY+mK\",\"isUserDigged\":false,\"longSecId\":\"Ci/KWnAeHBqexlfOnaNlJWGSFpPIKbK3UBHZC2mIMdL+sUnL+PniHOmbqUbV5/sPxxpLCjwGi65Vz1YTC6zntZE/oGo8mHbNFCYdC9xyKR8aH79oRajqVAcVFFFyuLabIxTPOPrQsly1ouUsEkjtUhEQrvzGDRj1vIa1CSABIgEDcw5L9w==\"},\"hideTxt\":\"未上架\",\"subTitle\":\"新年新气象，龙年行大运\",\"title\":\"暖暖祝你新春喜气洋洋\",\"cardType\":\"video\",\"showTitle\":true,\"moduleType\":2,\"uniqueId\":\"7324956075113840678\",\"bgImg\":[{\"showRetry\":true,\"showReplace\":true,\"name\":\"imageUpload.jpeg\",\"size\":\"6.6kb\",\"imageQuality\":\"\",\"status\":\"success\",\"showPicInfo\":true,\"url\":\"https://p9-magic.byteimg.com/tos-cn-i-tokbwntzau/magic_eco/cd309b15c7fe4d76a93106ef4fee4584~tplv-tokbwntzau-perf:0:0:q75.image?size=140x180\u0026magic_type=image_jpeg\",\"uid\":\"0.5478883104461616\"}],\"tabKey\":\"tab208\",\"cardTag\":\"精彩内容\",\"id\":\"c9d8a79bfa6aa7b1851ee571551e6c68\"},{\"bgImg\":[{\"imageQuality\":\"\",\"showReplace\":true,\"showPicInfo\":true,\"status\":\"success\",\"size\":\"9.5kb\",\"url\":\"https://p3-magic.byteimg.com/tos-cn-i-tokbwntzau/magic_eco/f022f5353e127be84aabb98ef2789f8b~tplv-tokbwntzau-perf:0:0:q75.image?size=140x180\u0026magic_type=image_jpeg\",\"uid\":\"0.4879801844089753\",\"showRetry\":true,\"name\":\"imageUpload.jpeg\"}],\"title\":\"崩坏3神秘嘉宾惊喜拜年\",\"moduleType\":2,\"prefectureName\":\"崩坏3\",\"videoIdObj\":{\"longSecId\":\"Ci970c1GJI/XZlRPLee8hHqoHpRAxJCsq+ut2EPS3QVqBvNrkUeeprqrZxwgM1D6eRpLCjz7PW4I5sHODtjOBed0+akprUgQCZshSPkom6m2cLv+D8/Z81wfL+UMe3nwpjLwiaLFyLKQyM2Kz6dV/wcQwojHDRj1vIa1CSABIgED8czK7g==\",\"isUserDigged\":false,\"appId\":1128,\"videoInfo\":{\"bigCoverUrl\":\"https://p26-sign.douyinpic.com/tos-cn-p-0015/oo3TdyCDjR7wBQkQ "cubic_fc3ba_config_resource_9":"{\"titleLogo\":\"https://sf1-cdn-tos.douyinstatic.com/obj/magic-cn/cubic/pure_png/title_new.png\",\"__version\":1}","cubic_olympic_ab":0,"cyber_0f91a_0802_setting":"{\"guideSchema\":\"https://www.bytedance.net/\",\"waitSec\":23,\"__version\":3}","cyber_act_yyh_ab":3,"cyber_act_yyh_effect_ab":0,"cyber_act_yyh_enable_scroll_monitor":0,"cyber_banner_switch":"prod","daily_rank_perf_config":{"enableSkeleton":true,"enableStraigtOut":true},"deco_text_modify_frequency":5,"disable_feed_mix_live_router_check":1,"disable_game_lottery":0,"doodle_max_count":140,"doodle_min_count":10,"ec_channel_check_login":0,"ecom_aftersale_aftersale_auto_next":0,"ecom_aftersale_big_font":0,"ecom_aftersale_instant_retail":0,"ecom_aftersale_returnbook_split":0,"ecom_aftersale_review":"0","ecom_comment_rank_style":0,"ecom_comment_style_opt1":0,"ecom_comment_style_opt2":0,"ecom_comment_upload":0,"ecom_fast_refund_colorless":0,"ecom_live_product_rank_ruler":[{"content":"- 抖音电商直播间带货榜是根据真实数据进行排名的直播间排行榜，希望帮助消费者通过榜单找到正在直播的好商品，让选择更简单。直播间排名越靠前曝光机会越大。","title":"直播间带货榜"},{"content":"- 直播间带货榜当前分为总榜、抖音旗舰榜、特色主题榜、国家补贴榜、商品类目榜，榜单形态持续更新中：\n- 总榜：按照上榜规则对全部电商直播间进行排序展示\n- 抖音旗舰榜：聚合抖音旗舰店铺热销直播间进行排序展示\n- 特色主题榜：由抖音电商运营就特色主题或活动，按照特定规则对直播间进行圈选后排序展示\n- 国家补贴榜：聚合正在直播国家补贴商品的直播间进行排序展示\n- 商品类目榜：按照直播间在播商品所属类目对相关直播间进行排序后展示","title":"榜单介绍"},{"content":"- 上榜直播间均为正在直播的直播间\n- 上榜作者基础要求：近30天无虚假交易处罚记录，近14天退单率无异常、无严重违规记录\n- 排序规则：以该直播间所售卖商品的【带货力、互动力、吸引力】进行综合排名，每小时结算","title":"上榜规则"},{"content":"- 带货力：根据单位时间内的交易额、交易量等数据指标综合评估直播间主播的带货能力\n- 互动力：根据单位时间内的直播间观看时长、分享率、评论率等数据指标综合评估直播间的互动氛围\n- 吸引力：根据单位时间内购买商品的新用户数、新增粉丝数等数据指标综合评估直播间对平台用户的吸引力","title":"指标解读"},{"content":"- 为保证榜单时效性，榜单每小时进行动态更新。由于技术等原因，榜单更新时间偶有延迟，具体更新时间以实际情况为准。\n- 直播间榜单会露出商品名称和商品标签。所有的上榜直播间都会展示一款商品，并露出对应的商品名称。同时，结合商品名称的露出，会露出唯一的商品标签，该标签由算法选取商品详情页的商品已有标签作为候选，不同的用户看到的标签不尽相同。整体上，商品标签的露出是为了给用户提供更多的决策理由，帮助更快的找到合适的直播间/商品。\n- 榜单排名旁的说明属于热度值标签，用于鼓励榜单中前3名的直播间和整体数据表现较好的直播间。热度标签只有三种，分别为：蝉联榜首、持续霸榜、排名飙升。每个直播间最多展示一种标签，若同一直播间同时获得多种热度标签，则按算法筛选展示唯一标签。\n- 平台将实时监控上榜直播间的数据表现，若发现直播间有刷单、互动异常、售卖假冒盗版商品等违规作弊行为，将立即对违规直播间进行下榜。低质作者、近期有虚假交易判罚、假货山寨判罚、直播间有处罚消息的作者均会有一定的上榜限制，请务必诚信经营、用心直播。","title":"补充说明"}],"ecom_live_scene_id_allow_list":["1001","1003","1031","1098","1099","1046","1091","1092","1093","1095","1082","1086","1087"],"ecom_logistics_map_late":0,"ecom_share_desc_type":0,"ecom_toolbar_ab":1,"effect_download_opt":true,"enable_anchor_gift":1,"enable_annie_live_transition_from_vc_fix":1,"enable_audio_draw_opt":false,"enable_broadcast_high_profile":1,"enable_feed_mix_live_router_check_arr":["search_result","general_search"],"enable_gift_extra_flex_model":false,"enable_gift_mp4_after_change_room":1,"enable_giftvideoview_render_appstate":0,"enable_live_thirhas_prop_bundled_party":false,"enable_new_guest_list_rule":true,"enable_preview_room_in_mobile_network":1,"enable_public_screen_layout_service":false,"enable_space_opt":false,"enable_switch_landscape":1,"enable_upstream_log":1,"enable_vip_recommend":true,"ent_bill_retain_popup":0,"entry":{"wallet_home":"sslocal://webcast_wallet"},"faction_competition_cross_room_rules":[{"desc":"榜单按照加入粉丝团、新增粉丝、送礼等互动行为综合排序，榜单值越高排名越靠前。","title":"排名规则"},{"desc":"榜单开启期间，观众每送出10钻石礼物、5名观众首次加入粉丝团或新增5个粉丝，均有机会为本直播间正在表演成员贡献1点榜单值，每名成员最多通过新加粉丝团获得1000点榜单值，每名成员最多通过新增粉丝获得1000点榜单值。","title":"计值规则"},{"desc":"本次活动由机构自行举办，与抖音平台无关。直播过程中有可能出现网络波动等极端情况导致数值存在一定误差的情况。","title":"其他"}],"faction_competition_region_rank_rules":[{"desc":"1）团员排名：自然日内累计榜单值，按赛道分别进行榜单排名，榜单数值每日24点清零，次日重新开始累计，达到当日晋级名次的主播成功进入下一轮。\n2）计值规则：1榜单值=10音浪=5新加团=5新增关注人数，每天最多通过加团获得1000榜单值，每天最多通过新增关注获得1000榜单值","title":"团员排名规则"},{"desc":"团榜单值=该团常驻团员榜单值加和，常驻团员将按照近期团员上场次数、送礼等数据综合判定，无法自主修改。","title":"团排名规则"},{"desc":"厂牌榜单值由旗下团员当日榜单值与榜单排名结果综合计算得出。每日比赛结束后（24:00）更新当日积分及排名结果。\n1）团员当日榜单值：当日超过1000荣誉值（+2分）；当日超过5000荣誉值（+5分）。若当日荣誉值超过5000，仅按+5分计，不与1000档叠加计算。单人单日最高得分为5分。\n2）团员榜单排名：每日比赛结束后，按厂牌团员排名计算得分，厂牌将获得其所有入榜团员的排名分之和。 金融风云人物","statistics_play_count":0,"video_cover_url_list":["https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/image-cut-tos-priv/a7c37367a7a9431d27f321983bc200d4~tplv-dy-resize-origshort-autoq-75:330.jpeg?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=2092132800\u0026x-signature=WVD29ZmkOXh%2B9lwFwX8wO03W7%2Fk%3D\u0026from=327834062\u0026s=PackSourceEnum_SERIES_AWEME\u0026se=false\u0026sc=cover\u0026biz_tag=pcweb_cover\u0026l=202604212037448C87CD788E32420FD51F","https://p9-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/image-cut-tos-priv/a7c37367a7a9431d27f321983bc200d4~tplv-dy-resize-origshort-autoq-75:330.jpeg?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=2092132800\u0026x-signature=U6YO2v7I5iClA%2BCosrgwjq99DpE%3D\u0026from=327834062\u0026s=PackSourceEnum_SERIES_AWEME\u0026se=false\u0026sc=cover\u0026biz_tag=pcweb_cover\u0026l=202604212037448C87CD788E32420FD51F"]}","can_cache_to_local":true,"caption":"债务大师许家印","cf_assets_type":0,"cf_recheck_ts":0,"cha_list":null,"challenge_position":null,"chapter_abstract":"恒大集团创始人许家印，凭借野心和手段，从农民家庭出身的打工仔成为中国首富。他利用债务优化和财务造假，将恒大打造成世界500强企业。然而，过度扩张和高负债最终导致恒大陷入危机，许家印也因此被采取强制措施。恒大的债务问题涉及数百万家庭，给社会带来了巨大影响。","chapter_bar_color":null,"chapter_data":{"ad_chapter_auto_skip_index_list":null,"ad_chapter_index_list":null,"recommend_type":"1"},"chapter_list":[{"desc":"引言","detail":"许家印靠借钱和赊账成为中国首富，后因财务造假被戳破，在港股被疯狂做空，准备到A股上市。","points":null,"timestamp":0,"url":""},{"desc":"早年生活与创业","detail":"许家印出生于农民家庭，高考后分配到河南舞阳钢铁厂，后南下深圳，成为深圳中达集团业务员，因提出涨薪被拒而辞职，创立恒大。","points":null,"timestamp":52000,"url":""},{"desc":"恒大的崛起","detail":"恒大凭借小户型低单价策略在房地产市场崛起，许家印通过软硬兼施、空手套白狼等手段，成功度过危机，使恒大成为全国名企。","points":null,"timestamp":179000,"url":""},{"desc":"上市之路与危机","detail":"恒大上市之路受阻，许家印通过打牌结识郑裕彤，获得资金支持，成功上市，成为全国市值最大的民营房企。","points":null,"timestamp":412000,"url":""},{"desc":"多元化发展与债务压力","detail":"恒大多元化发展，涉足多个领域，许家印在汽车业务上遭遇挫折，恒大债务压力增大。","points":null,"timestamp":600000,"url":""},{"desc":"财务造假与债务危机","detail":"恒大财务造假，许家印通过新兴公司抽血，将资金转移至国外，还为自己定制高息证券，提前锁定债务。","points":null,"timestamp":1304000,"url":""},{"desc":"许家印的下场","detail":"许家印涉嫌违法被采取强制措施，丁玉梅通过技术性诉讼转移 "},"show_items":null,"sub_type":0,"type":1,"user_count":0,"view_count":0}],"challenge_position":null,"chapter_abstract":"贾跃亭凭借财务造假和巧妙的资本运作，从农村出身的财会专业大专生成为中国创业板首富。他创立的乐视网在影视版权领域取得成功后，迅速扩张至多个领域，吸引了大量投资。然而，乐视的泡沫最终破裂，贾跃亭逃到美国，继续他的造车梦想。他在美国成立的法拉第未来公司，通过债务重组和吸引投资，成功获得了数十亿美元的资金。尽管贾跃亭的商业眼光超前，但他的诚信问题始终备受质疑。","chapter_bar_color":null,"chapter_data":{"ad_chapter_auto_skip_index_list":null,"ad_chapter_index_list":null,"recommend_type":"1"},"chapter_list":[{"desc":"引言","detail":"贾跃亭靠假账成为中国创业板首富，后逃到美国，收割800亿资金。","points":null,"timestamp":0,"url":""},{"desc":"早年生活与创业","detail":"贾跃亭出生农村，靠财务技术和县长千金关系起家，后涉足通信基站设备行业。","points":null,"timestamp":31000,"url":""},{"desc":"乐视网的崛起","detail":"贾跃亭在北京站稳脚跟，成立乐视网，购买大量影视版权，建立影视版权帝国。","points":null,"timestamp":115000,"url":""},{"desc":"造假与造梦","detail":"贾跃亭造假上市，提出生态化反战略，吸引投资，乐视估值飙升，贾跃亭成为中国创业板首富。","points":null,"timestamp":186000,"url":""},{"desc":"乐视的危机与贾跃亭的逃离","detail":"乐视危机爆发，贾跃亭逃离中国，孙宏斌接手乐视，贾跃亭在美国继续造车。","points":null,"timestamp":405000,"url":""},{"desc":"法拉第未来与债务重组","detail":"贾跃亭成立法拉第未来，吸引许家印投资，后申请个人破产，重组债务，获得中东财团投资。","points":null,"timestamp":489000,"url":""},{"desc":"结语","detail":"贾跃亭商业眼光超前，多次踩中风口，成功融资。","points":null,"timestamp":711000,"url":""}],"chapter_review_status":2,"city":"430100","cmt_swt":false,"collect_stat":0,"collection_corner_mark":0,"comment_gid":7605514933405491121,"comment_list":null,"comment_permission_info":{"can_comment":true,"comment_permission_status":0,"item_detail_entry":false,"press_entry":false,"toast_guide":false},"comment_words_recommend":{"zero_comment":null},"commerce_config_data":null,"commerce_info":{"ad_type":0,"is_ad":false},"common_button":{"button_list":[{"basic_info":{"btn_datas":null,"btn_name":"playlet_iaa_next","btn_type":"entertainment","btn_ui_style":0,"buttons":[{"btn_data_keys":null,"click_action":{"behavior_type":0,"btn_data_Keys":null,"click_action":1}}],"exemptions":[1,2]},"priority":200400}]},"component_info_v2":"{"desc_lines_limit":0,"hide_marquee":false}","cover_labels":null,"create_scale_type": "},"sub_type":0,"type":0,"user_count":0,"view_count":0}],"challenge_position":null,"chapter_abstract":"史前海洋统治者菊石、火山蜗牛、邓氏鱼、房角石、奇虾、泰坦鱼龙和皱囊虫的故事。这些生物在各自的时代都具有独特的生存优势，但最终都走向了灭绝。它们的命运反映了地球环境的变化和生命进化的复杂性。","chapter_bar_color":null,"chapter_data":{"ad_chapter_index_list":null,"recommend_type":"1"},"chapter_list":[{"desc":"引言","detail":"","points":null,"timestamp":3000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/95ca2a0e09874b82b84283c49d7574a7?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=60sfUG9EvaMnt2bHNhVVGb4a0YI%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"菊石","detail":"菊石是史前海洋霸主，外壳坚硬，内部结构复杂，具有强大的生存能力。然而，它们的完美进化导致了灭绝。","points":null,"timestamp":29000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/c6eb291d827f4373b85c97ebec36ab7c?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=Pvfxr3JpuT4rftdJ9m8oQA5wU1o%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"火山蜗牛","detail":"火山蜗牛生活在极端环境中，具有独特的铁甲结构和共生细菌。它们的生存依赖于深海热液喷口，但面临着人类采矿的威胁。","points":null,"timestamp":421000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/be57d0a787074a3d982c4731170270f4?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=tqRTISd7s5LFcKVSTGngUHoi%2F28%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"邓氏鱼","detail":"邓氏鱼是泥盆纪海洋的顶级杀手，具有强大的咬合力和锋利的牙齿。它们的灭绝与环境变化和食物短缺有关。","points":null,"timestamp":783000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/611d1254f97f4235a4785550ba4ad9db?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=uWY%2FP9p891y2pc0QqJtHhU45MEA%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"房角石","detail":"房角石是奥陶纪海洋霸主，具有强大的捕猎能力和外壳结构。它们的灭绝与环境变化和自身进化有关。","points":null,"timestamp":1160500,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/055aaf1259ae43e68e29b72369892016?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=3%2BQHtKc04eEtVO6sA%2BdAltJy4hM%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"奇虾","detail":"奇虾是寒武纪海洋的顶级掠食者，具有强大的眼睛和捕食钳子。它们的出现引发了寒武纪大爆发，但最终灭绝。","points":null,"timestamp":1568500,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/6ec50cec02e94ced873ed460a148f8f8?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=r0RVOX2VL1rXXYwrb6eBcV1YvEc%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"泰坦鱼龙","detail":"泰坦鱼龙是地球最大的动物，具有巨大的体型和强大的生存能力。它们的灭绝与环境变化和食物短缺有关。","points":null,"timestamp":1930000,"url":"https://p9-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/19d21a1250784a229aa7566e102c1887?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=0t8zvyAAK0tvDSgcp6MIczFe2E0%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"皱囊虫","detail":"皱囊虫是地球生命进化的关键物种，具有独特的身体结构和生存策略。它们的身份仍然是个谜，引发了对生命起源的思考。","points":null,"timestamp":2193500,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/fd9eb73766ac44c49298ae4d890cf031?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=KHzitDnYoNh4kJ5fmdwxc3KEbsI%3D\u0026from=327834062"}],"chapter_review_status":2,"collect_stat":0,"comment_list":null,"comment_permission_info":{"can_comment":true,"comment_permission_status":0,"item_detail_entry":false,"press_entry":false,"toast_guide":false},"commerce_config_data":null,"commerce_top_labels":null,"create_scale_type":null,"create_time":1775422722,"danmaku_control":{"activities":[{"id":1224,"type":1}],"danmaku_cnt":594,"enable_danmaku":true,"is_post_denied":false,"pass_through_params":"{\"has_danmaku\":1}","post_denied_reason":"","post_privilege_level":0,"skip_danmaku":false,"smart_mode_decision":0},"desc":"半小时看完史前海洋统治者，死因竟然都是因为自己进化得太完美？ "},"sub_type":0,"type":1,"user_count":0,"view_count":0}],"challenge_position":null,"chapter_abstract":"恒大上市背后是许家印和夏海钧的博弈。许家印凭借野心和激进策略，通过高杠杆扩张土地储备，为上市做准备。夏海钧则负责公司运营、财务和资本市场相关事宜。2008年金融危机导致上市受阻，但两人通过自救和贵人相助，最终在2009年成功上市，恒大成为全国巨头。然而，后来两人因相关违规行为被终身证券市场禁入。","chapter_bar_color":null,"chapter_data":{"ad_chapter_index_list":null,"recommend_type":"1"},"chapter_list":[{"desc":"上市前的准备","detail":"许家印为上市疯狂借钱扩张，土地储备从2006年的不到600万平方米增长到2008年的4500多万平方米。","points":null,"timestamp":1000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/ff5df2adff6f42e5a422dedaef894ea4?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=bwswyLPqU0hsGScW31tQwJpplvw%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"许家印与夏海钧的合作","detail":"许家印与夏海钧合作，夏海钧负责公司运营、财务和资本市场相关事宜，两人分工明确。","points":null,"timestamp":76000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/bce288ed9a5b4ce8ae9e2a0e308acbde?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=CpBLkAn6LGwk1Vy9Jeh8SgezjlQ%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"上市之路的挫折与自救","detail":"2008年金融危机导致恒大上市受阻，许家印和夏海钧展开自救，许家印赢得郑裕彤赏识，夏海钧采取债务变权益和降价促销等措施缓解危机。","points":null,"timestamp":209000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/6ac417d6de61452dbcd4bdef6f565ecb?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=dFp6RcqjnB93iifZJUKpL63nQeA%3D\u0026from=327834062"},{"desc":"上市的成功与蜕变","detail":"2009年恒大成功上市，市值大涨，许家印成为内地新首富，夏海钧拿到股权激励，两人后来因违规行为被终身证券市场禁入。","points":null,"timestamp":331000,"url":"https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/obj/tos-cn-p-0015/61817ae5e0384ce08d0057872cbb594b?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=1776794400\u0026x-signature=NqGfhgZneJkGJgXds6GPNt5NzVc%3D\u0026from=327834062"}],"chapter_review_status":2,"collect_stat":0,"comment_list":null,"comment_permission_info":{"can_comment":true,"comment_permission_status":0,"item_detail_entry":false,"press_entry":false,"toast_guide":false},"commerce_config_data":null,"commerce_top_labels":null,"create_scale_type":null,"create_time":1773031437,"danmaku_control":{"activities":[{"id":1224,"type":1}]," 金融风云人物","statistics_play_count":0,"video_cover_url_list":["https://p9-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/image-cut-tos-priv/a7c37367a7a9431d27f321983bc200d4~tplv-dy-resize-origshort-autoq-75:330.jpeg?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=2092132800\u0026x-signature=U6YO2v7I5iClA%2BCosrgwjq99DpE%3D\u0026from=327834062\u0026s=PackSourceEnum_SERIES_AWEME\u0026se=false\u0026sc=cover\u0026biz_tag=pcweb_cover\u0026l=20260421203746BBD52073C56F9A1A0D7C","https://p3-pc-sign.douyinpic.com/image-cut-tos-priv/a7c37367a7a9431d27f321983bc200d4~tplv-dy-resize-origshort-autoq-75:330.jpeg?lk3s=138a59ce\u0026x-expires=2092132800\u0026x-signature=WVD29ZmkOXh%2B9lwFwX8wO03W7%2Fk%3D\u0026from=327834062\u0026s=PackSourceEnum_SERIES_AWEME\u0026se=false\u0026sc=cover\u0026biz_tag=pcweb_cover\u0026l=20260421203746BBD52073C56F9A1A0D7C"]}","can_cache_to_local":true,"caption":"债务大师许家印","cf_assets_type":0,"cf_recheck_ts":0,"cha_list":null,"challenge_position":null,"chapter_abstract":"恒大集团创始人许家印，凭借野心和手段，从农民家庭出身的打工仔成为中国首富。他利用债务优化和财务造假，将恒大打造成世界500强企业。然而，过度扩张和高负债最终导致恒大陷入危机，许家印也因此被采取强制措施。恒大的债务问题涉及数百万家庭，给社会带来了巨大影响。","chapter_bar_color":null,"chapter_data":{"ad_chapter_auto_skip_index_list":null,"ad_chapter_index_list":null,"recommend_type":"1"},"chapter_list":[{"desc":"引言","detail":"许家印靠借钱和赊账成为中国首富，后因财务造假被戳破，在港股被疯狂做空，准备到A股上市。","points":null,"timestamp":0,"url":""},{"desc":"早年生活与创业","detail":"许家印出生于农民家庭，高考后分配到河南舞阳钢铁厂，后南下深圳，成为深圳中达集团业务员，因提出涨薪被拒而辞职，创立恒大。","points":null,"timestamp":52000,"url":""},{"desc":"恒大的崛起","detail":"恒大凭借小户型低单价策略在房地产市场崛起，许家印通过软硬兼施、空手套白狼等手段，成功度过危机，使恒大成为全国名企。","points":null,"timestamp":179000,"url":""},{"desc":"上市之路与危机","detail":"恒大上市之路受阻，许家印通过打牌结识郑裕彤，获得资金支持，成功上市，成为全国市值最大的民营房企。","points":null,"timestamp":412000,"url":""},{"desc":"多元化发展与债务压力","detail":"恒大多元化发展，涉足多个领域，许家印在汽车业务上遭遇挫折，恒大债务压力增大。","points":null,"timestamp":600000,"url":""},{"desc":"财务造假与债务危机","detail":"恒大财务造假，许家印通过新兴公司抽血，将资金转移至国外，还为自己定制高息证券，提前锁定债务。","points":null,"timestamp":1304000,"url":""},{"desc":"许家印的下场","detail":"许家印涉嫌违法被采取强制措施，丁玉梅通过技术性诉讼转移资产，最终资产被冻结。","points":null,"timestamp":1447500,"url":""}],"chapter_review_status":2,"city":"430600","cmt_swt":false,"collect_stat":0,"collection_corner_mark":0,"comment_gid":7606639650555948731,"comment_list":null,"comment_permission_info":{"can_comment":true,"comment_permission_status":0,"item_detail_entry":false,"press_entry":false,"toast_guide":false},"comment_words_recommend":{"zero_comment":null},"commerce_config_data":null,"commerce_info":{"ad_type":0,"is_ad":false},"common_button":{"button_list":[{"basic_info":{"btn_datas":null,"btn_name":"playlet_iaa_next","btn_type":"entertainment","btn_ui_style":0,"buttons":[{"btn_data_keys":null,"click_action":{"behavior_type":0,"btn_data_Keys":null,"click_action":1}}],"exemptions":[1,2]},"priority":200400}]},"component_info_v2":"{"desc_lines_limit":0,"hide_marquee":false}","cover_labels":null,"create_scale_type":["f_w"],"create_time":1771058807,"danmaku_control":{"activities":[{"id":1224,"type":1}],"danmaku_cnt":1046,"enable_danmaku":true,"first_danmaku_offset":0,"is_post_denied":false,"last_danmaku_offset":1618142,"pass_through_params":"{"has_danmaku":1}","post_denied_reason":"","post_privilege_level":0,"skip_danmaku":false},"desc":"债务大师许家印","desc_language":"zh","disable_relation_bar":0,"dislike_dimension_list":null,"dislike_dimension_list_v2":null,"distance":"","distribute_circle":{"campus_block_interaction":false,"distribute_type":0,"is_campus":false},"distribute_type":2,"diversion_bar_info":null,"douplus_user_type":0,"douyin_p_c_video_extra":"{"ai_note_v2":1}","douyin_pc_video_extra_seo":"","duet_aggregate_in_music_tab":false,"duration":1618222,"ecom_comment_atmosphere_type":1,"effect_inflow_effects":null,"enable_comment_sticker_rec":false,"enable_decorated_emoji":true,"ent_log_extra":{"log_extra":"{"global_log_extra":null,"page_log_extra":null,"aweme_log_extra":{"ce_current_group_id":"7606639650555948731","author_id":"3280553840225496","ce_content_id":"7331343457304184867","ce_content_type":"playlet","ce_content_sub "},"show_items":null,"sub_type":0,"type":1,"user_count":0,"view_count":0}],"challenge_position":null,"chapter_abstract":"贾跃亭凭借财务造假和巧妙的资本运作，从农村出身的财会专业大专生成为中国创业板首富。他创立的乐视网在影视版权领域取得成功后，迅速扩张至多个领域，吸引了大量投资。然而，乐视的泡沫最终破裂，贾跃亭逃到美国，继续他的造车梦想。他在美国成立的法拉第未来公司，通过债务重组和吸引投资，成功获得了数十亿美元的资金。尽管贾跃亭的商业眼光超前，但他的诚信问题始终备受质疑。","chapter_bar_color":null,"chapter_data":{"ad_chapter_auto_skip_index_list":null,"ad_chapter_index_list":null,"recommend_type":"1"},"chapter_list":[{"desc":"引言","detail":"贾跃亭靠假账成为中国创业板首富，后逃到美国，收割800亿资金。","points":null,"timestamp":0,"url":""},{"desc":"早年生活与创业","detail":"贾跃亭出生农村，靠财务技术和县长千金关系起家，后涉足通信基站设备行业。","points":null,"timestamp":31000,"url":""},{"desc":"乐视网的崛起","detail":"贾跃亭在北京站稳脚跟，成立乐视网，购买大量影视版权，建立影视版权帝国。","points":null,"timestamp":115000,"url":""},{"desc":"造假与造梦","detail":"贾跃亭造假上市，提出生态化反战略，吸引投资，乐视估值飙升，贾跃亭成为中国创业板首富。","points":null,"timestamp":186000,"url":""},{"desc":"乐视的危机与贾跃亭的逃离","detail":"乐视危机爆发，贾跃亭逃离中国，孙宏斌接手乐视，贾跃亭在美国继续造车。","points":null,"timestamp":405000,"url":""},{"desc":"法拉第未来与债务重组","detail":"贾跃亭成立法拉第未来，吸引许家印投资，后申请个人破产，重组债务，获得中东财团投资。","points":null,"timestamp":489000,"url":""},{"desc":"结语","detail":"贾跃亭商业眼光超前，多次踩中风口，成功融资。","points":null,"timestamp":711000,"url":""}],"chapter_review_status":2,"city":"430100","cmt_swt":false,"collect_stat":0,"collection_corner_mark":0,"comment_gid":7605514933405491121,"comment_list":null,"comment_permission_info":{"can_comment":true,"comment_permission_status":0,"item_detail_entry":false,"press_entry":false,"toast_guide":false},"comment_words_recommend":{"zero_comment":null},"commerce_config_data":null,"commerce_info":{"ad_type":0,"is_ad":false},"common_button":{"button_list":[{"basic_info":{"btn_datas":null,"btn_name":"playlet_iaa_next","btn_type":"entertainment","btn_ui_style":0,"buttons":[{"btn_data_keys":null,"click_action":{"behavior_type":0,"btn_data_Keys":null,"click_action":1}}],"exemptions":[1,2]},"priority":200400}]},"component_info_v2":"{"desc_lines_limit":0,"hide_marquee":false}","cover_labels":null,"create_scale_type":
